ground_truth.title: RESTAURANT Definition & Meaning | Dictionary.com
ground_truth.main_content: restaurant - American spelling: /ˈrɛs təˌrɑnt, -trɑnt/, British spelling: /ˈrɛstrɒŋ, -rɒnt, ˈrɛstəˌrɒŋ/. Definition: an establishment where meals are served to customers. A commercial establishment where meals are prepared and served to customers. Etymology: An Americanism first recorded in 1820-30; from French, noun use of present participle of restaurer, from Latin restaurare 'to restore, reestablish'. Example sentences from various publications illustrate real-world usage of the word in context. Related words include bar, cafeteria, coffee shop, diner, dining room, inn, outlet, and saloon.
